subject: refactor(docs): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props standard structure
body:
Standardize repo-tor's CLAUDE.md to match the shared glow-props template
used across all devmade-ai projects. This ensures consistent AI assistant
behavior and documentation patterns.

Changes:
- Add Suggested Implementations (PWA, Debug, Icons, PDF, Timer fix, HTTPS Proxy)
- Standardize Principles to glow-props 7 (extras moved to AI Notes)
- Replace Documentation subsection with standard 9-file managed set
- Move @coder/@data personas into AI Notes
- Rename AI_LESSONS.md → AI_MISTAKES.md (standard name)
- Rename USER_TESTING.md → TESTING_GUIDE.md (standard name)
- Update all active references across docs and source code

Tags: documentation, refactor, alignment
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: patch
